title: gladiolus calcicola
intro: Gladiolus calcicola, also known as the calcicole gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. The medicinal properties of Gladiolus calcicola include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as a diuretic, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Gladiolus calcicola can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
